parameters.command:
=mkdir -p "{{ $('Merge Body Into LaTeX').first().json.work_dir }}"

echo "{{ $('Merge Body Into LaTeX').first().json.latex_base64 }}" | base64 -d > "{{ $('Merge Body Into LaTeX').first().json.tex_path }}"

echo "{{ $('Merge Body Into LaTeX').first().json.change_log_base64 }}" | base64 -d > "{{ $('Merge Body Into LaTeX').first().json.log_path }}"

cd "{{ $('Merge Body Into LaTeX').first().json.work_dir }}"

echo "WORK DIR:"
pwd

echo "TEX FILE:"
ls -lh "{{ $('Merge Body Into LaTeX').first().json.tex_file_name }}"

echo "CHECKING BOLD:"
grep -n "textbf" "{{ $('Merge Body Into LaTeX').first().json.tex_file_name }}" | head -50 || true

echo "CHECKING CHANGE LOG:"
cat "{{ $('Merge Body Into LaTeX').first().json.log_file_name }}" | head -120 || true

echo "REMOVING OLD PDF:"
rm -f "{{ $('Merge Body Into LaTeX').first().json.pdf_file_name }}"

echo "COMPILING COVER LETTER WITH PDFLATEX:"
pdflatex -interaction=nonstopmode -halt-on-error "{{ $('Merge Body Into LaTeX').first().json.tex_file_name }}"
pdflatex -interaction=nonstopmode -halt-on-error "{{ $('Merge Body Into LaTeX').first().json.tex_file_name }}"

echo "FINAL PDF:"
ls -lh "{{ $('Merge Body Into LaTeX').first().json.pdf_file_name }}"

parameters.completionMessage: Your PDF is ready to download.

parameters.formDescription: Paste your LaTeX template, job description, and prompt. This will generate a downloadable PDF.

values.defaultValue:
Write a cover letter for the following job description in MY style.

IMPORTANT REQUIREMENTS (VERY STRICT):
- Keep it SHORT (max 4–5 paragraphs)
- Must sound HUMAN, not AI or corporate
- No fluff, no generic phrases like “I am excited to apply”
- No begging tone, no desperation
- Confident but grounded (early-career but capable)
- Use simple, natural language (like how a real person speaks)
- Avoid em dashes completely
- Focus on REAL experience, do NOT invent anything
- Highlight full-stack, backend, APIs, cloud, and problem-solving experience when relevant
- Show ownership mindset (debugging, fixing issues, understanding systems)
- Add 1 subtle line showing persistence / discipline (but NOT emotional or begging)
- Align strongly with the role (mirror keywords naturally, not forced)

STRUCTURE:
1. Strong hook (WHY this role actually interests me, specific and real)
2. My relevant experience (Persuasive Computing Lab + projects + tech stack)
3. My skills aligned to job (APIs, cloud, Docker, CI/CD, data systems, etc.)
4. Why I am a good fit (ownership, learning fast, systems thinking)
5. Closing (simple, confident, no fluff)

TONE:
- Real human
- Slightly conversational but still professional
- No overused phrases
- No exaggeration
- No fake claims

OUTPUT FORMAT (bold relevant points):
- Give LaTeX version using the template:

---

parameters.formDescription: Paste your resume LaTeX and job description. This will generate a tailored resume PDF.

parameters.command:
=mkdir -p "{{ $('Merge Resume Suggestions').first().json.work_dir }}"

echo "{{ $('Merge Resume Suggestions').first().json.resume_base64 }}" | base64 -d > "{{ $('Merge Resume Suggestions').first().json.tex_path }}"

echo "{{ $('Merge Resume Suggestions').first().json.change_log_base64 }}" | base64 -d > "{{ $('Merge Resume Suggestions').first().json.log_path }}"

cd "{{ $('Merge Resume Suggestions').first().json.work_dir }}"

echo "WORK DIR:"
pwd

echo "TEX FILE:"
ls -lh "{{ $('Merge Resume Suggestions').first().json.tex_file_name }}"

echo "CHECKING BOLD:"
grep -n "textbf" "{{ $('Merge Resume Suggestions').first().json.tex_file_name }}" | head -50 || true

echo "CHECKING COMMENTED OLD POINTS:"
grep -n "OLD:" "{{ $('Merge Resume Suggestions').first().json.tex_file_name }}" | head -80 || true

echo "CHECKING CHANGE LOG:"
cat "{{ $('Merge Resume Suggestions').first().json.log_file_name }}" | head -150 || true

echo "REMOVING OLD PDF:"
rm -f "{{ $('Merge Resume Suggestions').first().json.pdf_file_name }}"

echo "COMPILING WITH PDFLATEX:"
pdflatex -interaction=nonstopmode -halt-on-error "{{ $('Merge Resume Suggestions').first().json.tex_file_name }}"
pdflatex -interaction=nonstopmode -halt-on-error "{{ $('Merge Resume Suggestions').first().json.tex_file_name }}"

echo "FINAL PDF:"
ls -lh "{{ $('Merge Resume Suggestions').first().json.pdf_file_name }}"

parameters.completionMessage: Your tailored resume PDF is ready.

parameters.formDescription: Choose resume or cover letter and enter the company and role used when generating it.

parameters.completionMessage: Your editable LaTeX file is ready to download.

parameters.command:
=base="{{ $('Build TEX Search Info').first().json.base_name }}"
tex_file="${base}.tex"

SEARCH_DIRS="/home/node/n8n-files /home/node/.n8n-files"

found_file=""

for dir in $SEARCH_DIRS; do
  if [ -d "$dir" ]; then
    file=$(find "$dir" -type f -name "$tex_file" | sort | tail -n 1)
    if [ -n "$file" ]; then
      found_file="$file"
    fi
  fi
done

if [ -z "$found_file" ]; then
  echo "ERROR: No TEX file found for ${base}" >&2
  echo "Checked folders:" >&2
  echo "/home/node/n8n-files" >&2
  echo "/home/node/.n8n-files" >&2
  exit 1
fi

echo "$found_file"
